'''Savage Squadron''' was one of the two [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] made up of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] from [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] piloting [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] [[Ugly/Legends|uglies]], the other being [[Tough Squadron]]. They fought in the [[evacuation of Dubrillion]] and the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

Savage Squadron was the greater of the two, being composed of ships that had shields or powerful weapons. It was originally termed '''Salvage Squadron''' before [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] changed the name following how fierce they fought at Dubrillion. By the time the decision to evacuate [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] arrived, all but one flight of Savage Squadron had been destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
